hero.subtext: Privacy-focused activity tracking. Understand how you spend your time with detailed analytics and local-only data storage.

whyTimiGS.title: Why Choose TimiGS
whyTimiGS.subtitle: Discover the features that make TimiGS the best choice for time tracking and productivity

privacy.title: 100% Privacy
privacy.description: All data stored locally in SQLite. Zero telemetry, zero cloud uploads. You own every byte of your data.

focus.title: Focus Mode
focus.description: Lock yourself into productive work. Block app switching with a password-protected Focus Mode that keeps you on task.

timeout.title: Smart Breaks
timeout.description: Time OUT feature reminds you to take breaks. Set custom intervals and protect your health while staying productive.

analytics.title: Rich Analytics
analytics.description: Beautiful Donut, Pie, and Bar charts. Day-by-day timeline view. Understand exactly where your time goes.

crossplatform.title: Cross-Platform
crossplatform.description: Built with Tauri v2 for high performance on Windows, Linux, and macOS.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: Free forever and open source. Built with transparency and community trust at its core.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to take control of your time and boost productivity

tracking.title: Real-time Tracking
tracking.description: Automatically detects active windows and tracks usage duration without any manual input.

timeline.title: Timeline View
timeline.description: Browse activity history day-by-day with granular details. Search and filter your entire history.

focus.title: Focus Mode
focus.description: Eliminate distractions with our powerful focus mode. Block distracting apps and stay on track.

weather.title: Built-in Weather
weather.description: Weather widget right in your tracker. Auto-detect location or set manually — plan your day without leaving the app.

animations.title: Smooth & Beautiful
animations.subtitle: Crafted with attention to every detail

live.title: Live Activity
live.description: Watch your activity update in real-time with smooth animations

transitions.title: Smooth Transitions
transitions.description: Every interaction feels natural with fluid animations

visual.title: Visual Feedback
visual.description: Get instant visual feedback for every action you take

comparison.title: Compare TimiGS
comparison.subtitle: See how TimiGS stacks up against other popular time tracking solutions

platforms.title: Built for Performance
platforms.subtitle: Powered by modern technologies for the best experience
platforms.tech: Built with Tauri v2, Rust & Vue 3

macos.name: macOS
macos.description: Optimized for macOS. Supports Intel and Apple Silicon

linux.name: Linux
linux.description: AppImage, RPM, and DEB packages available

cta.title: Ready to take control?
cta.subtitle: Start tracking your time today and unlock your productivity potential

downloads.title: Download TimiGS
downloads.subtitle: Choose the version for your operating system.
downloads.windows_desc: Native 64-bit installers for Windows 10 and 11. Choose .exe for standard installation.
downloads.mac_desc: Optimized for macOS. Supports Intel and Apple Silicon chips via universal binaries.
downloads.linux_desc: Packages for major distributions. AppImage for universal compatibility, RPM for Fedora, and DEB for Ubuntu/Debian.
downloads.source_desc: Need access to source code tarballs, checksums, or older releases? Visit the full release page on GitHub.
downloads.no_assets_platform: No assets available for this platform

terms.title: Terms & Privacy
terms.privacy_content: TimiGS is designed with privacy as a core value. All data collected by the application regarding your activity is stored strictly locally on your device using an encrypted SQLite database. We do not transmit your personal data to any external cloud servers.
terms.data_content: You own your data. You have full control to export, delete, or modify your local database at any time. TimiGS provides tools within the application to manage your data retention policies.
terms.license_content: TimiGS is protected under the TimiGS Public License (TPL) v1.0. Free to use, modify, and distribute with proper attribution to BANSAFAn. The name "TimiGS" must be preserved in all derivative works.

testing.title: Testing Builds
testing.subtitle: Latest development builds and commit history.
testing.alpha_warning: These builds are unstable and may contain bugs. Use at your own risk.
